title: Gravestone: Core
description: A library Palladium addon full of scripts and useful assets
body:
# Gravestone: Core Gravestone: Core is a library addon for palladium adding useful features, abilities and functionality that base palladium is lacking. ## features
Abilities ## The list of Palladium abilities At the moment there is a big push to convert Core to a Mod-Addonpack which means changing a load of the namespaces and abilities to be through java (removing the need for Kubejs) ### everything in the new gravecore namespace -Bonemeal Blocks -Dynamic Attribute Modifier -Disable Burning -Potion Punch -projectile -screenshake -set palladium property by score -spin -swing hands ### everything in the old gravestone namespace -aoe damage -aoe knockback -charged knockback -drain accessory stored energy -explode -targeted knockback -movement -store armour -stone detection
Conditions ## The list of Palladium conditions At the moment there is a big push to convert Core to a Mod-Addonpack which means changing a load of the namespaces and abilities to be through java (removing the need for Kubejs) ### everything in the new gravecore namespace -mainhand -is player ### everything in the old gravestone namespace -uuid checker -selected power -persistent data checker -null persistent data checker -month -day and month -key press detection -accessory energy store detection -improved potion effect checker -accessory checker -acessory energy comparison -camera checker
Items ## The list of items -16 fabric colours -palladium ingot, nugget and raw varients -titanium ingot and nugget varients -chocolate coated ants -sonic sound gun -silicon wafer -screen -plastic -basic, advanced and netherite batteries -basic and advanced motherboards -datacard -cpu -copper wires
Blocks ## The list of blocks -deepslate titanium ore, block and raw block varients -palladium ore, block and raw block varients -ice layers
Misc ## The list of things that dont fit into any of this catagory -custom model data grabbing scoreboards -titanium armour material type -ray particle emitters for right, left and both hands -on fire option effect -frozen potion effect -electrocuted effect -cant interact entity tag -soulless entity tag -physical damage type tag -intangability blackist block tag -dimension predicates -increase and decrease count item modifiers -smelt items item modifier -player id score -bouncing projectiles -tags to identify player direction
### where can you suggest features? I will have a section for it set up on my discord server, I dont believe there will be any other places so best to head there for a definitive place to go! ### Why Having a project thats not feature packed but instead allows for people to create new and exciting projects with a bit easier of a time has always just sounded fun. A library project is really really helpful for this AND has the added benefit of beign able to make compatability a lot easier, logically things using the same library shouldnt overlap. Core is a public free use addon. as long as you dont take things directly from the code for your own addon feel free to do whatever with it! its designed to be just an extra dependancy that means the dev doesnt have to dip into kubejs or something more complex for a little longer, enjoy life a bit simpler for a little longer.
Extra credits special thanks to all these people that created scripts that ended up being used and either gave me permission or left them in the threetag discord for public use Nexominer Codec MinecraftBossDJ PhantomPig Habb Hazender Hertz if i have missed anyone im so sorry, your name will be in the ability you provided's description tho
### any server using Gravestone: Core cannot charge people more than $5 for any ingame additions, ingame vanity items though you can go to town with prices :D This is against minecrafts TOS and by putting Gravestone: Core into a server you are also agreeing to the above statement (which has been here since the creation of the modpage) this description was brought to you by DeadedAndZen, they did not like writing this much at all
